name: Foo Fighters
description:
__Height:__ 165 cm
__Prisoner Number:__ FE39423
__Manga Debut:__ Chapter 26
__Anime Debut:__ Episode 7

F.F. is a fusion of Stand and Stand User; a colony of plankton that is organized, maintained by, and essentially equivalent to the Stand, Foo Fighters. At first serving Enrico Pucci, they soon ally themself with Jolyne Cujoh out of gratitude.
